title: Sincere Optimization
description: Sincere Optimization is a modpack that can boost your fps from 75 to over 1000 while running/walking! There are 65 mods/resource packs and you don't need to change any settings for this too work!
body: This is Sincere Optimization, A modpack with so many optimization mods that your game will run at over 1000 fps! (with a nvidia geforce rtx 3070 paired with a AMD Ryzen 7 1800X Eight-Core Processor that is) It could go anywhere from 750-2000 FPS depending on your gpu/cpu 😅. But seriously, I thought you couldnt get over 1000 fps in a superflat world. THIS IS IN A BASE WORLD! Anyways, try it out! See if you like it!
